name: WildhavenCEO
summary: A CEO workspace agent. Drop a vault of strategy / legal / budget / pitch / playbook documents in, then ask questions and get answers in a confident operator's voice. Wraps the pattern from kody-w/wildhaven-ceo: 'talk to the workspace' as the whole interface.
egg_note: Stateless per call. The workspace context is supplied at invoke time; no shipped state.

args.question: How are the rentals doing this month?
args.workspace_context: (paste your latest property-summary CSV + budget notes here)
